list.title: Students
list.activeCount: {count, plural, one {# active student.} other {# active students.}}
list.deleteDescription: The student will be deactivated. Their parents will no longer be able to start new trips for them.

emptyFiltered.title: No matching students
emptyFiltered.description: Try removing filters or changing your search term.

empty.title: You haven't added any students yet
empty.description: Upload an Excel with the parent + student list, or create one manually.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by first name, last name, or student ID

new.title: New student
new.subtitle: Only first and last name are required.
new.noGradesWarning: You haven't configured any grades yet. You can still create the student and assign a grade later, but it's best to set up grades first.

import.title: Import students
import.subtitle: Upload an Excel or CSV with the student list. Grades are matched by name; the student ID is what you later reference in the parents' Excel.

dropzone.columnsHint: Columns: nombre, apellido, grado (optional), matricula (optional), nacimiento (optional)

example.title: Example of a valid file
example.hint: This is what the data looks like. The student ID is what you later reference in the parents' Excel (ids_alumnos column).

pickup.title: Pickup mode
pickup.subtitle: How the student is picked up from school.
pickup.privateVehicleHint: The representative picks them up in their own vehicle (registered from the parent app).
pickup.walkingHint: The representative picks them up on foot. No vehicle or GPS: on arrival they tap "I'm outside" in the app.
pickup.transportHint: A transport service picks them up. Enter the details of the person in charge.

reps.title: Guardians / Representatives
reps.subtitle: People responsible for picking up the student at school. Each one receives an invitation to create their account. Email takes priority over WhatsApp.

validation.repName: Each representative needs a first and last name.
validation.repContact: Each representative needs an email or phone number.
validation.transport: For transport: person in charge, plate, and type (van/bus) are required.

toasts.invitationsUnsent: {count, plural, one {# invitation not sent} other {# invitations not sent}} — check the invitations list
toasts.invitationsCreateFailed: The invitations could not be created

grades.title: Grades
grades.subtitle: Group your students. The name is up to you — "1st Grade A", "Kindergarten", etc.

families.title: School families
families.subtitle: List of parents with their students, vehicles, and secondary family members.

new.title: Add parent
new.subtitle: Invite a parent to existing student(s), without re-uploading the Excel.
new.studentsSubtitle: Choose which student(s) this parent is linked to.
new.searchStudents: Search by name or student ID…
new.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# student selected} other {# students selected}}
new.parentSubtitle: They receive an invitation to create their account. Email takes priority over WhatsApp.

families.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone…
families.emptyFiltered: No parents found matching that search.
families.empty: No parents have claimed their account yet.
families.familyMembersCount: {count, plural, one {# family member} other {# family members}}

vehicles.title: Registered vehicles
vehicles.subtitle: Vehicles associated with the school's parents.
vehicles.searchPlaceholder: Search by plate, model, or parent…
